tool_args.label: Transit and Bus Committee Meeting May 2022
tool_args.raw_text: Transit and Bus Committee Meeting May 2022. MTA New York City Transit and Bus Committee Meeting book containing meeting minutes, executive summary, and detailed performance reports for April 2022.

payload.title: NYCT/MTA Bus Committee Book
payload.description: Transit and Bus Committee Meeting book for May 2022, including meeting minutes from April 25, 2022, President's Message, Executive Summary, Subway Report, Bus Report, Paratransit Report, Safety Report, Crime Report, and Financial & Ridership Reports.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Transit and Bus Committee Meeting May 2022

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Transit and Bus Committee Meeting - May 2022
tool_args.raw_text: New York City Transit and Bus Committee Meeting, Monday, 5/23/2022, 10:15 - 11:30 AM ET, 2 Broadway, 20th Floor Board Room, New York, NY 10004

payload.event_name: New York City Transit and Bus Committee Meeting
payload.description: Monthly Transit and Bus Committee Meeting of the MTA New York City Transit Authority, Manhattan and Bronx Surface Transit Operating Authority, Staten Island Rapid Transit Operating Authority, and MTA Bus Company.

evidence_refs.source_quote: New York City Transit and Bus Committee Meeting

tool_args.label: Richard Davey's First Day as NYCT President
tool_args.raw_text: MTA New York City Transit President Richard Davey (right) rode the subway and spoke to employees and customers on his first day on the job, Monday, May 2nd.

payload.event_name: Richard Davey first day as NYCT President
payload.description: Richard Davey started as President of MTA New York City Transit on May 2, 2022. Previously served as Massachusetts Secretary of Transportation and General Manager of the MBTA.

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA New York City Transit President Richard Davey (right) rode the subway and spoke to employees and customers on his first day on the job, Monday, May 2nd.

tool_args.label: Bronx Local Bus Network Redesign Implementation
tool_args.raw_text: This month the MTA launched its new trip planner tool ahead of the implementation of the Bronx Local Bus Network Redesign on June 26th.

payload.event_name: Bronx Local Bus Network Redesign implementation
payload.description: Implementation date for the Bronx Local Bus Network Redesign. The redesign modifies 13 Bronx bus routes and adds two new ones.

evidence_refs.source_quote: This month the MTA launched its new trip planner tool ahead of the implementation of the Bronx Local Bus Network Redesign on June 26th.

tool_args.label: OMNY Reduced-Fare Program Launch
tool_args.raw_text: Customers who are interested in switching to OMNY and would like to use their contactless bank card or smart device will be able to switch starting as early as June.

payload.description: Launch of OMNY for Reduced-Fare customers. Reduced-Fare OMNY cards to arrive later in 2022.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Customers who are interested in switching to OMNY and would like to use their contactless bank card or smart device will be able to switch starting as early as June.

tool_args.label: Bronx Local Bus Network Redesign - Implementation May 2022 Update
tool_args.raw_text: This month the MTA launched its new trip planner tool ahead of the implementation of the Bronx Local Bus Network Redesign on June 26th. The redesign modifies 13 Bronx bus routes and adds two new ones.

evidence_refs.source_quote: This month the MTA launched its new trip planner tool ahead of the implementation of the Bronx Local Bus Network Redesign on June 26th. The tool allows customers to preview their trip before the implementation of the redesign to see how their Bronx bus routes will change. The redesign modifies 13 Bronx bus routes and adds two new ones.

tool_args.label: Queens Bus Network Redesign Draft Plan Released

tool_args.label: Q102 route revision - no annual operating cost impact
tool_args.raw_text: Judith McClain, Chief, Operations Planning, NYCT, discussed a proposed revision to the Q102 route. She reported the change would not affect annual operating cost, as the net travel distance time would remain the same. She stated that the proposed implementation date is this Spring or Summer.

payload.claim_text: A proposed revision to the Q102 route would not affect annual operating cost, as the net travel distance time would remain the same. Proposed implementation date is Spring or Summer 2022.
payload.description: Proposed Q102 route revision with no net operating cost impact

evidence_refs.source_quote: Judith McClain, Chief, Operations Planning, NYCT, discussed a proposed revision to the Q102 route. She reported the change would not affect annual operating cost, as the net travel distance time would remain the same.

tool_args.label: Essential Workers Plaque Unveiling at 250 Broadway
tool_args.raw_text: The MTA joined Mayor Eric Adams and the Downtown Alliance in unveiling a plaque in front of 250 Broadway on April 28 honoring essential workers during the COVID-19 pandemic.

payload.description: Plaque unveiled at 250 Broadway honoring essential workers during the COVID-19 pandemic. MTA Bus Operator Alejandra Frino attended as guest.

tool_args.label: Zero-Emissions Fleet Consulting Contract
tool_args.raw_text: Another major milestone is the upcoming award of a consulting services contract in support of our zero-emissions fleet transformation.

payload.claim_text: Upcoming award of a consulting services contract in support of zero-emissions fleet transformation. The contract will evaluate existing service plan and facilities, develop implementation strategies, assess existing conditions, develop a comprehensive plan to support rollout through 2029, and focus on post-2029 transition to 100% zero-emissions fleet by 2040.
payload.description: Upcoming award of consulting services contract for zero-emissions fleet transformation planning.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Another major milestone is the upcoming award of a consulting services contract in support of our zero-emissions fleet transformation.
